abstract: The paper investigates a firm’s optimal targeted advertising strategy when the incentives of the firm and those of the consumers are misaligned and how these considerations affect the consumers’ choices for their data privacy.

affiliation: Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology
authors_full.name: Jungju Yu

ob.ai_reason: 定向广告涉及数据隐私但非AI核心
ob.tldr: 研究在企业目标与消费者利益冲突时，企业如何优化定向广告策略及消费者是否选择退出个人数据共享。通过博弈模型发现，企业可通过错误投放来隐含推荐产品，且在隐私保护压力下合理设置数据退出选项能提升整体收益。

title: Targeted Advertising as Implicit Recommendation: Strategic Mistargeting and Personal Data Opt-out
title_zh: 作为隐性推荐的定向广告：策略性错误定位与个人数据退出机制
